title: Excalibur | Aether Support
description: A retexture of the mod, The Aether. Adapted and made to run alongside the Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew.
body:
![Aether Excalibur Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee867b784c1a2b64fb463e3b90da997c13fba4ae.png)

![Scenery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e6f6a78231cd5d07bd345225b0d56235f9467e4.png)

A **resource pack** designed to align the aesthetics of the original [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) mod with the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. This pack is considered 100% completed, containing 250+ textures for various items and blocks.

Additional support for Aether's official and unofficial addons is planned. Currently, there is no ETA on when they may be completed.

## Installation: 
> Launch Minecraft and click on "Options"

> Click on "Resource Packs"

> Click on "Open Resource Pack Folder"

> Drag the AetherExcaliburSupport.zip file into the resource pack folder
  
> Move the Aether Excalibur Support resource pack from the left column to the right

> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

> Select "Done" 

> The Sky Awaits
